## X-Sense Home Security v1.2.6.26

### 🎥 Camera WebRTC
- Uses the camera ticket's signal heartbeat interval for the WebRTC signal socket.
- Keeps the APK-style offer, ICE, and startLive flow unchanged while testing the next camera stability pass.

### 🔎 Debug Logging
- Includes the chosen signal heartbeat in camera startup debug context.
